symptoms: The test is quarantined by skipping `TestDefaultValForAnalyze` (race-only) because it was affecting CI and no targeted stabilization was provided.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR only quarantines the flakiness by skipping `TestDefaultValForAnalyze` under the race build (`c.Skip("skip race test")`). There is no failure signature or root-cause analysis in the PR/case data, so we cannot confidently classify the underlying cause beyond insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
